name: Prefect
description: Monitor Prefect data workflow orchestration for pipeline reliability and access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Prefect Cloud at https://app.prefect.cloud
2. Go to Profile → API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Prefect Cloud Profile → API Keys
